title: SPOT-OD v1.2.5 Zenodo metadata repair release
description: Metadata-only repair release for SPOT-OD v1.2.5-zenodo-metadata-repair. This release repairs GitHub-to-Zenodo import metadata after the Zenodo record for v1.2.4-acf-prospective-guard, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20836876, inherited stale GraphAnchorPairGate/v1.2.1 title, version, and description text even though the GitHub release, link, and file were for v1.2.4. This release adds no new scientific result and does not upgrade the evidence to operational precise-reference validation, independent-machine reproduction, full raw/training/all-filter rerun, learned-superiority evidence, third-party validation, or confirmatory operational readiness.
notes: The v1.2.4 DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20836876 is treated here as the previous Zenodo record affected by a metadata import mismatch: its archived GitHub release link and file targeted v1.2.4-acf-prospective-guard, but its imported title/version/description text remained stale GraphAnchorPairGate/v1.2.1 metadata. The clean public access and integrity boundary remains v1.2.3-acf-holdout-audit, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20825138, until a corrected v1.2.5 Zenodo DOI is verified. This release is metadata repair only and adds no new scientific result.
